name: Darkest Diabolos, Lord of the Lair
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ディアボロス
desc:
Your opponent cannot Tribute this face-up card on the field, and cannot target it with card effects. You can only use each of these effects of "Darkest Diabolos, Lord of the Lair" once per turn.
● If a DARK monster you control is Tributed (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your GY (if it was there when you Tributed) or hand (even if not).
● You can Tribute 1 DARK monster; your opponent places 1 card from their hand on either the top or bottom of the Deck.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Curse of the Dark

action: Places cards from the opponent's hand on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's hand on the bottom of the Deck
mst: Cannot be targeted by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
